title: What’s Coming to Disney+ in April 2026
content:
ByArushi Jacob

Disney+is heading into April with a packed lineup of premieres, returning favorites and major live sports.April kicks off with the premiere of “Dear Killer Nannies” and “Pizza Movie.” ESPN broadcasts events begin early, including the NCAA Women’s college basketball games, along with Men’s hockey. On the entertainment side, new and returning titles arrive across Disney+ and Hulu, with highlights like “Sīrat” available for streaming, the premiere of “The Testaments” and Season 2 of “Daredevil: Born Again.”Nikki Glaser’s “Good Girl” comedy special and “Celebrity Jeopardy” round out the month, with the NBA and NHL playoffs kicking off on April 18.Takea look at Disney+’s full April slate below, and sign up for aDisney+ account here.

April 1“Atomic” (Universal)“Dear Killer Nannies” (Hulu) (Premiere)“Donna Hay Coastal Celebrations” (Disney+ Original)“O11CE: New Generation” (Disney+ Original)“Secrets of the Bees” (Premiere)

April 3“Pizza Movie” (Hulu Original) (Premiere)“Vegas Golden Knights vs. Anaheim Ducks” (ESPN)“NCAA Women’s College Basketball Tournament Semifinals: Game One” (ESPN)“NCAA Women’s College Basketball Tournament Semifinals: Game Two” (ESPN)

April 4“Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES”“Detroit Red Wings vs. New York Rangers”(ABC, ESPN)“Colorado Avalanche vs. Dallas Stars”(ABC, ESPN)“Louisville Kings vs. Orlando Storm” (ABC, ESPN)

April 5“Washington Capitals vs. New York Rangers” (ESPN)“Inside Out Classic: Washington Capitals vs. New York Rangers” (Disney+, ESPN+) –“NCAA Women’s College Basketball Championship” (ABC, ESPN)“Bay FC vs. Washington Spirit” (ESPN2, ESPN Deportes)“St. Louis Blues vs. Colorado Avalanche” (ESPN)

April 6“American Idol” (ABC and Disney+)“In Your Radiant Season” (Hulu Original)“Sirāt” (Hulu)“Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord” (Disney+ Original)

April 7“Daredevil: Born Again” (Season 2) (Disney+ Original)

April 8“Hey A.J.!” (Disney+)“How Not to Draw: Shorts”“O11CE: New Generation” (Disney+ Original)“The Testaments” (Hulu Original) (Premiere)“The Masters: Par Three Contest” (ESPN+, Disney+)

April 9“The Masters: First Round” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“Men’s NCAA Hockey Tournament Semifinals: Game One” (ESPN2)“Men’s NCAA Hockey Tournament Semifinals: Game Two” (ESPN2)

April 10“Malcolm in the Middle: Life’s Still Unfair” (Hulu Original) (Premiere)“RoboGobo” (Disney+)“Perfect Crown” (Hulu Original) (Premiere)“The Masters: Second Round” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)

April 11“Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts” (Disney+)“Perfect Crown” (Hulu Original)“Tampa Bay Lightning vs. Boston Bruins” (ABC, ESPN)“Washington Capitals vs. Pittsburgh Penguins” (ABC, ESPN)“Men’s NCAA Hockey Championship” (ESPN)“Vegas Golden Knights vs. Colorado Avalanche” (ABC, ESPN)

April 12“Birmingham Stallions vs. St. Louis Battlehawks” (ABC, ESPN)April 13“American Idol” (ABC)“Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord” (Disney+ Original)

April 14“Daredevil: Born Again” (Disney+ Original)“Meet Iron Man and his Awesome Friends” (Disney+)“#SKYKING”(Hulu Original) (Premiere)“Washington Capitals vs. Columbus Blue Jackets” (ESPN)“Pittsburgh Penguins vs. St. Louis Blues”(ESPN)

April 15“O11CE: New Generation” (Disney+ Original)

April 17“Innate” (Hulu)“Little Margo Stories: Shorts” (Disney+) (Premiere)“Perfect Crown” (Hulu Original)

April 18“Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts” (Disney+)“Perfect Crown” (Hulu Original)“NBA Playoffs Begin” (ESPN)“NHL Playoffs Begin” (ESPN)“St. Louis Battlehawks vs. DC Defenders” (ABC, ESPN)“NCAA Women’s Gymnastics Championship” (ABC, ESPN)“WWE WrestleMania 42” (ESPN App*)

April 19“WWE WrestleMania 42” (ESPN App*)

April 20“American Idol” (ABC, Disney+)“Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord” (Disney+ Original)

April 21“Daredevil: Born Again” (Disney+ Original)April 22“Mickey Mouse Clubhouse+” (Disney+)“O11CE: New Generation” (Disney+ Original)“Orangutan” (Disney+ Original) (Premiere)April 24“Nikki Glaser: Good Girl” (Hulu Original) (Premiere)“No Other Choice” (Hulu)“The Prep School Disappearance” (Disney+)“Perfect Crown” (Hulu Original)

April 25“Good Boy” (Hulu)“Perfect Crown” (Hulu Original)“Copa del Rey Final” (ESPN+, ESPN Deportes)“St. Louis Battlehawks vs. Orlando Storm” (ESPN)

April 26“Angel City FC vs. Portland Thorns” (ESPN2)“Louisville Kings vs. Dallas Renegades” (ABC, ESPN)April 27“American Idol” (ABC, Disney+)“Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord” (Disney+ Original)“Songs in Sign Language” (Disney+ Original) (Premiere)

April 28“Daredevil: Born Again” (Disney+ Original)

April 29“O11CE: New Generation” (Disney+ Original)“SuperKitties” (Disney+)

April 30“Project Runway All Stars” (Disney+)
content_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

Disney+將在四月推出一系列精彩的首映、回歸的熱門節目和重大現場體育賽事。四月的開端將迎來《親愛的殺手保姆》(Dear Killer Nannies)和《披薩電影》(Pizza Movie)的首映。ESPN的賽事將提前開始，包括NCAA女子大學籃球賽和男子冰球賽。在娛樂方面，Disney+和Hulu將推出多部新作和回歸作品，亮點包括可供串流的《Sīrat》，《聖約》(The Testaments)的首映，以及《惡棍英雄：重生》(Daredevil: Born Again)第二季。尼基·格萊澤(Nikki Glaser)的喜劇特輯《好女孩》(Good Girl)和《名人危機四伏》(Celebrity Jeopardy)將為這個月畫上句號，NBA和NHL季後賽將於四月十八日開始。以下是Disney+四月的完整節目表，您可以在此註冊Disney+帳戶。

四月一日
《原子》(Atomic) (環球影業)  
《親愛的殺手保姆》(Dear Killer Nannies) (Hulu) (首映)  
《唐娜·海(Donna Hay)海岸慶典》(Donna Hay Coastal Celebrations) (Disney+ 原創)  
《O11CE: 新世代》(O11CE: New Generation) (Disney+ 原創)  
《蜜蜂的秘密》(Secrets of the Bees) (首映)  

四月三日  
《披薩電影》(Pizza Movie) (Hulu 原創) (首映)  
《維加斯金騎士 vs. 安那翰鴨子》(Vegas Golden Knights vs. Anaheim Ducks) (ESPN)  
《NCAA女子大學籃球錦標賽半決賽：第一場》(NCAA Women’s College Basketball Tournament Semifinals: Game One) (ESPN)  
《NCAA女子大學籃球錦標賽半決賽：第二場》(NCAA Women’s College Basketball Tournament Semifinals: Game Two) (ESPN)  

四月四日  
《儲物櫃日記：殭屍》(Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES)  
《底特律紅翼 vs. 紐約遊騎兵》(Detroit Red Wings vs. New York Rangers) (ABC, ESPN)  
《科羅拉多雪崩 vs. 達拉斯星隊》(Colorado Avalanche vs. Dallas Stars) (ABC, ESPN)  
《路易斯維爾國王 vs. 奧蘭多風暴》(Louisville Kings vs. Orlando Storm) (ABC, ESPN)  

四月五日  
《華盛頓首都人 vs. 紐約遊騎兵》(Washington Capitals vs. New York Rangers) (ESPN)  
《內心的經典：華盛頓首都人 vs. 紐約遊騎兵》(Inside Out Classic: Washington Capitals vs. New York Rangers) (Disney+, ESPN+)  
《NCAA女子大學籃球錦標賽》(NCAA Women’s College Basketball Championship) (ABC, ESPN)  
《灣區FC vs. 華盛頓精神隊》(Bay FC vs. Washington Spirit) (ESPN2, ESPN Deportes)  
《聖路易藍調隊 vs. 科羅拉多雪崩》(St. Louis Blues vs. Colorado Avalanche) (ESPN)  

四月六日  
《美國偶像》(American Idol) (ABC 和 Disney+)  
《在你光輝的季節》(In Your Radiant Season) (Hulu 原創)  
《Sīrat》(Sirāt) (Hulu)  
《星際大戰：莫爾 - 影子之主》(Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord) (Disney+ 原創)  

四月七日  
《惡棍英雄：重生》(Daredevil: Born Again) (第二季) (Disney+ 原創)  

四月八日  
《嘿，A.J.!》(Hey A.J.!) (Disney+)  
《如何不畫畫：短片》(How Not to Draw: Shorts)  
《O11CE: 新世代》(O11CE: New Generation) (Disney+ 原創)  
《聖約》(The Testaments) (Hulu 原創) (首映)  
《大師賽：三桿賽》(The Masters: Par Three Contest) (ESPN+, Disney+)  

四月九日  
《大師賽：第一輪》(The Masters: First Round) (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)  
《男子NCAA冰球錦標賽半決賽：第一場》(Men’s NCAA Hockey Tournament Semifinals: Game One) (ESPN2)  
《男子NCAA冰球錦標賽半決賽：第二場》(Men’s NCAA Hockey Tournament Semifinals: Game Two) (ESPN2)  

四月十日  
《中間的馬爾科姆：生活依然不公平》(Malcolm in the Middle: Life’s Still Unfair) (Hulu 原創) (首映)  
《機器人戈博》(RoboGobo) (Disney+)  
《完美王冠》(Perfect Crown) (Hulu 原創) (首映)  
《大師賽：第二輪》(The Masters: Second Round) (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)  

四月十一日  
《儲物櫃日記：殭屍：短片》(Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts) (Disney+)

《維加斯金騎士 vs. 科羅拉多雪崩》(Vegas Golden Knights vs. Colorado Avalanche) (ABC, ESPN)  

四月十二日  
《伯明翰騎士 vs. 聖路易斯戰鷹》(Birmingham Stallions vs. St. Louis Battlehawks) (ABC, ESPN)  

四月十三日  
《美國偶像》(American Idol) (ABC)  
《星際大戰：莫爾 - 影子之主》(Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord) (Disney+ 原創)

四月十四日  
《惡棍：重生》(Daredevil: Born Again) (Disney+ 原創)  
《遇見鋼鐵人和他的超棒朋友》(Meet Iron Man and his Awesome Friends) (Disney+)  
《#SKYKING》(Hulu 原創) (首播)  
《華盛頓首都人對哥倫布藍夾克》(Washington Capitals vs. Columbus Blue Jackets) (ESPN)  
《匹茲堡企鵝對聖路易藍調》(Pittsburgh Penguins vs. St. Louis Blues) (ESPN)  

四月十五日  
《O11CE：新世代》(O11CE: New Generation) (Disney+ 原創)  

四月十七日  
《天生的》(Innate) (Hulu)  
《小瑪格故事：短片》(Little Margo Stories: Shorts) (Disney+) (首播)  
《完美皇冠》(Perfect Crown) (Hulu 原創)  

四月十八日  
《儲物櫃日記：殭屍：短片》(Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts) (Disney+)  
《完美皇冠》(Perfect Crown) (Hulu 原創)  
《NBA 季後賽開始》(NBA Playoffs Begin) (ESPN)  
《NHL 季後賽開始》(NHL Playoffs Begin) (ESPN)  
《聖路易戰鷹對華盛頓防衛者》(St. Louis Battlehawks vs. DC Defenders) (ABC, ESPN)  
《NCAA 女子體操錦標賽》(NCAA Women’s Gymnastics Championship) (ABC, ESPN)  
《WWE 摔角狂熱 42》(WWE WrestleMania 42) (ESPN App*)  

四月十九日  
《WWE 摔角狂熱 42》(WWE WrestleMania 42) (ESPN App*)  

四月二十日  
《美國偶像》(American Idol) (ABC, Disney+)  
《星際大戰：莫爾 - 影子之主》(Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord) (Disney+ 原創)  

四月二十一日

四月二十二日

summary_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

Disney+將在四月推出一系列精彩的首映、回歸的熱門節目和重大現場體育賽事。四月的開端將迎來《親愛的殺手保姆》(Dear Killer Nannies)和《披薩電影》(Pizza Movie)的首映。ESPN的賽事將提前開始，包括NCAA女子大學籃球賽和男子冰球賽。
